prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类（含理科）最低位次约 10146→12887→12901→15967→18072，整体呈持续后移趋势，近 4 年累计后移约 7926 名，2025 年基准约 18072 名；该校在吉林省物理类招生计划 2021–2024 年均为 33 人，2025 年增至 34 人；2026 年计划 37 人，较 2025 年扩招 3 人（+8.8%），扩招使竞争略有缓解，位次数字相应增大。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜 2026 年约第 71 名，近年排名持续上升（2021 年 83→2026 年 71），学校综合实力稳步提升；2025 年声誉偏负面（生命科学学院就业率仅 4.63% 引发关注）；抖音热度排名第 62（一般），短视频曝光量中等；未见明显投档断档记录；民族学 A+、生态学 A、统计学 A-，其中统计学与物理类招生专业（统计学、数据科学与大数据技术等）直接相关，对相关专业报考有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工 程等工科专业持续高热，云南大学物理类招生涵盖计算机类、电子信息类、数据科学等热门方向，与市场热度匹配；吉林省 2026 年高考总人数 110868 人，按近年物理类占比约 72% 估算约 79936 人，较 2025 年 80421 人略减约 485 人，竞争略有缓和；云南大学位于昆明，属西南地区，对东北考生存在一定地域距离感；该校在吉林省招生占比约 0.5%–1%（2025 年约 34 人/全国约 5575 人），属小规模招生省份，跨省报考需权衡地域偏好。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026 年扩招 3 人使竞争略有缓解、吉林省考生总数小幅下降、学校排名稳步提升但声誉偏负面等因素；预测 2026 年物理类最低位次约 19059 名，区间 18559–19559 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category (including Science) was approximately 10146→12887→12901→15967→18072, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 7926 positions over the past 4 years. The 2025 baseline is about 18072. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Jilin Province was 33 students from 2021 to 2024, increasing to 34 in 2025. In 2026, the plan is 37 students, an increase of 3 students (+8.8%) compared to 2025, which slightly eases competition and correspondingly increases the ranking number.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science Main Ranking approximately 71st in 2026, with rankings steadily rising in recent years (83 in 2021 to 71 in 2026), indicating a steady improvement in overall strength. In 2025, reputation was somewhat negative (the employment rate of the School of Life Sciences was only 4.63%, attracting attention). Douyin popularity ranking 62nd (average), with moderate short video exposure. No obvious record of admission gaps. Ethnology A+, Ecology A, Statistics A-, with Statistics directly related to Physics Category enrollment majors (Statistics, Data Science and Big Data Technology, etc.), which has some appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly popular. Yunnan University's Physics Category enrollment includes popular directions like Computer, Electronic Information, and Data Science, matching market demand. In 2026, the total number of Jilin Province Gaokao examinees is 110,868, with an estimated 79,936 in Physics Category based on the recent proportion of about 72%, a slight decrease of about 485 from 80,421 in 2025, easing competition slightly. Yunnan University is located in Kunming, in the Southwest region, creating a certain geographical distance for Northeast examinees. The university's enrollment proportion in Jilin Province is about 0.5%–1% (about 34 out of approximately 5,575 nationwide in 2025), making it a small-scale enrollment province, and cross-province applications require weighing regional preferences.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the slight easing of competition due to the enrollment increase of 3 students in 2026, the small decrease in the total number of Jilin Province examinees, the steady rise in school rankings but somewhat negative reputation, the predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is approximately 19,059, with a range of 18,559–19,559.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 18,559–19,559, it is recommended to use Tier 2 as the main filling range, Tier 1 majors (Computer, Software, Communication, etc.) as sprint choices, and Tier 3 majors (Chemistry, Environmental, Materials, etc.) as safe backups. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<18,559), focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>19,559), it is recommended to mainly rely on Tier 3 as a backup.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category (including Liberal Arts) was approximately 2004→1753→3670→2408→2356, with significant fluctuations, notably a clear backward shift in 2023 (3670th place), stabilizing in the 2356–2408 range in recent two years; the 2025 baseline is approximately 2356th place; the enrollment plan for this university in Jilin Province's History Category was 12 students in both 2021 and 2022, 13 in 2023, 12 in 2024, and reduced to 7 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 8 students, an increase of 1 student (+14.3%) compared to 2025, which slightly eases competition and correspondingly increases the ranking number.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking approximately 71st in 2026, with continuous improvement in recent years and steadily enhancing comprehensive strength; reputation slightly negative in 2025 (employment data attracted attention); Douyin popularity ranking 62nd (average), with moderate short video exposure; no obvious gaps in admission records; Ethnology A+ (top nationally), directly related to History Category majors such as Ethnology and Political Science and Administration, strongly attracting liberal arts candidates; Ecology A and Statistics A- have low relevance to liberal arts majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law is divided and wait-and-see, Chinese Language/Literature recommended; Yunnan University's History Category enrollment includes Law, Chinese Language and Literature, Political Science and Administration, etc., with good alignment with popular liberal arts majors; in 2026, Jilin Province's History Category candidates, estimated at approximately 28% of total, number about 30,932, a slight decrease of about 139 from 2025's 31,071, slightly easing competition; Yunnan University is located in Kunming, Southwest China, creating a certain geographical distance for candidates from Northeast China; the university's enrollment scale in Jilin Province's History Category is small (only 7 in 2025), requiring cross-province applicants to balance regional preferences and major choices.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the stabilization of historical rankings in recent two years, the slight easing of competition due to the 2026 enrollment increase of 1 student, the small decline in the total number of History Category candidates in Jilin Province, and the strong appeal of Ethnology A+ to liberal arts students; it is predicted that the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 will be approximately 2578th place, with a range of 2114–3042.
